name: luminousminer
description: Dependency manifest for building LuminousMiner via vcpkg (Boost subset + OpenSSL + OpenCL loader). Enabled by -DUSE_VCPKG=ON and a vcpkg toolchain file; used by the Docker images and CMake presets. OpenCL/OpenSSL are default-features so existing AMD/native builds are unchanged; the windows-nvidia-cross preset sets VCPKG_MANIFEST_NO_DEFAULT_FEATURES (no OpenCL needed, OpenSSL supplied prebuilt).

openssl.description: OpenSSL via vcpkg (stratum TLS). Omit when OpenSSL is supplied externally (e.g. prebuilt MSVC libs in the NVIDIA cross build).
